sections.label: Weather
sections.required_close: Make the wear/carry advice useful and natural.

sections.label: Geopolitics
sections.required_close: Close with the practical implication naturally, without a label.

sections.label: Technology and AI
sections.required_close: Close with the practical implication naturally, without a label.

sections.label: Stock market
sections.required_close: Close with the practical implication naturally, without a label.

sections.label: Watch list for today
sections.required_close: Turn the briefing into a few concrete threads to revisit; do not recap the whole briefing.

sections.label: Closing question
sections.required_close: Ask only: Any questions on Operation Daybreak, Captain?

style.voice: Ryan system voice when available; premium, cinematic, energetic, warm, concise, lightly British in cadence without imitating any copyrighted character
style.story_tone: good-news-only: constructive, useful, promising, forward-looking, high-signal developments without gloomy or panic-heavy narration
avoid: repeating the same story across categories
stale stories unless context is essential
style.date_policy: Use exact dates when relevant and prefer events published in the last 24 hours.

ask_for: what could go wrong even in optimistic markets
cross-domain links from geopolitics and AI into portfolio impact
